narrative_votes: URW: Negative Consequences for the West

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: तीसरा विश्व युद्ध छिड़ा तो 3 टुकड़ों में बंट जाएगी दुनिया!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text explicitly mentions the possibility of a third world war, which evokes fear and anxiety about potential threats and dangers.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: जल्दी युद्धविराम न हो, तो दोनों देशों की आग पूरी दुनिया में फैल जाएगी और चाहे-अनचाहे हर कोई युद्ध का हिस्सा होगा.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text predicts the potential consequences of the war, including the possibility of it spreading globally and involving other countries.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: कोविड वैक्सीन का असमान बंटवारा भी बनेगा वजह
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the Western countries, particularly the United States, for their handling of the COVID-19 vaccine distribution, implying that it has led to a sense of distrust and disillusionment among weaker nations.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: बड़े इंटरनेशनल संगठन, जो आमतौर पर शांति की बात करते हैं, वे कमजोर हो जाएंगे.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text suggests that the current international organizations, often dominated by Western countries, will become weaker and less effective in maintaining peace and stability.
